multiple_comparisons_note: ~110 descriptive cells across A1-A7; headline tests per finding stated inline. A6 shape scan pre-registered K=8 splits; A5 miss counterfactuals tested 7 reason groups.
cost_model: EV/share = q - p - 0.07*p*(1-p), p = fill = ask + 1c slip; gas $0.004/trade (~0.004c/share at 100sh, ignored in per-share numbers)

slip_sensitivity.method: q backed out so EV=+1.5c/+3.0c at slip=1c on each fill mix, then EV recomputed vs slip; sensitivity ~1.006c EV per 1c slip (price + d(fee)/dp)

limit_at_mid.frontier: at spread p50=1c, limit-at-mid saves 1.5c vs taker if filled; ties taker (+1.5c) at fill prob 0.5 with ZERO adverse selection; at fill prob 0.8 tolerates only a 1.1c conditional-q drop
limit_at_mid.adverse_selection_evidence: Polymarket Up-token price moves |p60-p20| median 14c (n=216, pm_prices_sample.json) inside the entry window - resting orders fill preferentially when price crosses them, so conditional-q drop is plausibly large; do NOT switch to maker without a live shadow maker book

F1_slip_spread_robustness.verdict: ask+1c taker model is conservative vs measured spreads (fill-at-ask already crosses a 1c-median spread; the +1c slip is buffer). Low-end central estimate has only ~1.5c of slip headroom - fill-conformance alarm (|dp50|>1.5c) is exactly the right tripwire.

live_paired.construction: impulse50 (flat $50, same signals) traded 8 t0s the flagship skipped (f_nonpos / caps)
live_paired.result: wr 2/8 = 0.25, mean entry 0.5125, realized EV -28.0c/share, 95% block-boot CI [-52.6, +8.5], p(EV>=0)=0.034

F2_kelly_skip_validated_live.mechanism: identical win rate in both cost halves of the gated book (q=.4286 both) - the skip earns its keep purely by refusing cost>qhat fills, exactly the launch geometry FINAL-DESIGN 4.3 predicted
F2_kelly_skip_validated_live.caveats: n small (8 live / 21 measure, partially overlapping); one week of data; effect size huge so direction is what matters
F2_kelly_skip_validated_live.verdict: bucketed-qhat f_nonpos skip is confirmed value-adding on data it never saw; impulse50 flat-sizing arm is strictly dominated and should stay a $0 control

F3_speed_is_not_alpha.winners_vs_losers_entrySec_p50_rev_famil: 11s vs 10s (old era 9s vs 10s) - the prior 'winners p50=9s' is the entry distribution, not a speed edge
F3_speed_is_not_alpha.power_note: CI on the stratified contrast is roughly +/-8c/share - a speed effect above ~8c is excluded, small ones are not
F3_speed_is_not_alpha.verdict: no measurable EV in entry speed after controlling price/engine/era; keep revWinMin for fill-quality reasons only; zero case for latency spend

F4_cap_miss_counterfactual_confounded.raw: cap-blocked (Rev<=53c/55c) near-misses resolved FOR the wanted side 11/13 unique t0 (q=.846, binom p=.011 vs 0.5, p=.048 vs q*(54c)=.5874, 7 reason groups tested)
F4_cap_miss_counterfactual_confounded.confound: 12 of 13 were ALSO outside the 45s entry window ('Near open' short) - ask was high because the interval had already moved; only n=1 clean within-window cap miss. Miss records store neither ask nor eval timestamp, so fee-clearing at the true price is unverifiable (breakeven price for q=.846 is ~83c, but Wilson 95% lower bound q=.57 puts breakeven at ~55c).
F4_cap_miss_counterfactual_confounded.other_guards: late-only misses q_cf=.548 (n=31 unique) ~ breakeven at 51c; Isolated-gate-blocked q_cf=.50 (n=8); wide-spread-blocked 0/8 (guard saved money)
F4_cap_miss_counterfactual_confounded.verdict: directionally interesting, not deployable; the cheap fix is instrumentation: log ask + eval-time in miss records, and let the pre-registered cap55_shadow / day-60 cap verdict decide

D1_passcount_margin.result: win rate is strongly monotone in margin (0.503/0.591/0.694 for margin 0/1/2+) but entry price rises faster (0.506/0.611/0.627); EV: -1.96/-3.66/+5.03c (margin-2 n=49, CI [-13.7,+22.1]). need+1 counterfactual per retired engine all fee-negative: loose -2.71c, floor -2.86c, band -3.59c, value -3.47c (all p_diff_le0 > 0.6 vs margin==0).
D1_passcount_margin.mechanism: the book already prices signal strength; margin buys win rate at fair-or-worse odds
D1_passcount_margin.caveat: as-fired subset approximates a true need+1 engine (which could fire later at other prices)

D2_pretrigger_1m_shape.result: K=8 pre-registered splits (spike/monotone/late/early/eff5). TRAIN (candle sim Jun26-Jul7, n=717, base q .587): best |z|=1.76 and its sign disagrees with TEST. Ledger TEST (n=133 unique t0): best split eff5>=0.8 +14.98c p=0.042 - best-of-8 with NO TRAIN support = noise by the program's own bar.
D2_pretrigger_1m_shape.verdict: trigger shape does not separate winners from losers at the same entry price

D3_partial_fills.result: fillFrac<1 on 3 of 3,481 trades (0.09%); stake<reqStake on 3. No sample to test 'thin book = informed book'.
D3_partial_fills.verdict: non-event under $50-class stakes; revisit only if stakes scale 10x

D4_limit_at_mid.result: quantified frontier only - beats taker iff fill prob > ~0.5 with near-zero adverse selection; PM mid moves 14c median within the entry window, so adverse selection is likely disqualifying. Untestable without a maker shadow book.
D4_limit_at_mid.verdict: not a research finding; would require live maker instrumentation

D5_pooled_30_45s_bin.result: +1.65c CI [-2.55,+6.03] - momentum-era composition artifact, gone within families
